blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,913 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
